provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Refugees (Recognition and Control) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In these Regulations "form" means a form prescribed in the Schedule.

provisions.title: Quorum of Committee
provisions.content:
3. Quorum of Committee
The quorum of a Refugee Advisory Committee shall be the Chairman and two members.

provisions.title: Witness fees
provisions.content:
4. Witness fees
A witness who is summoned before a Refugee Advisory Committee under section 5(1) of the Act shall be entitled to witness fees at the rate prescribed for witnesses appearing in criminal prosecutions before a magistrate's court.

provisions.title: Prescribed forms
provisions.content:
5. Prescribed forms
(1) A notice for the purposes of section 5(1)( a ) of the Act shall be in Form A.
(2) A notice for the purposes of section 5(1)( b ) of the Act shall be in Form B.
(3) A notice for the purposes of section 5(1)( d ) of the Act shall be in Form C.
(4) A warrant for the purposes of section 6( b ) of the Act shall be in Form D.
(5) A direction by the Minister under section 9(2) of the Act shall be in Form E.

definitions.definition: a form prescribed in the Schedule.
